lines.speaker: Mernik
lines.text: Oh, hello! Children, say hello to the surface-dweller.

lines.speaker: Mernik
lines.text: I'm sure you look just as funny to the surface-dweller!

lines.speaker: Mernik
lines.text: There's no need to be rude!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin child
lines.text: Are you really from the surface?

lines.speaker: Cave goblin child
lines.text: Are you [player name]? Did you help Zanik save the city?

lines.speaker: Mernik
lines.text: Just because [he's/she's] a surface-dweller, doesn't mean [he's/she's] [player name]! There are lots of surface-dwellers!

lines.speaker: Mernik
lines.text: Zanik told me about you! I'm so pleased to meet you!

lines.speaker: Mernik
lines.text: Well don't blame me if he doesn't want to talk to you either!
